description: Wisdom rules seeded at genre-proposal time from a successful reflection. Expected to be curated + extended via future LEARN.5 wisdom-rule proposals as sessions in this genre accumulate.

rules.rule: Tile matching games MUST have a grid layout where tiles can be moved or merged.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: The game should end when no more moves are possible on the grid.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: A preview of the next tile can enhance strategic planning.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Use smooth animations to enhance the user experience when tiles merge.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Design the game with a clean, minimalist aesthetic for mobile devices.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre
